title: Trendul șase-șapte (cu ouă)
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, Romanian village aesthetic, warm golden cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive warm film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: ohwxbunica, a cheerful elderly Romanian grandmother with rosy cheeks and kind eyes, wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf

shots.line: Bună, fetelor! Trendul ăsta nou, șase-șapte? Eu îl fac de cincizeci de ani.
shots.image_prompt: holding up six fingers on one hand and seven on the other right next to her grinning face, standing in a rustic wooden chicken coop with a wicker basket of brown eggs on her arm, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she proudly holds up six fingers then seven fingers next to her face and grins at the camera, playful natural head movement, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Șase ouă azi. Mâine, șapte. Ăsta-i tot secretul, dragelor.
shots.image_prompt: extreme close-up of weathered hands holding six brown eggs cupped over a rustic wicker basket, warm morning light inside a wooden chicken coop, shallow depth of field
shots.motion_prompt: the weathered hands gently cup six brown eggs over the basket, one egg rolling slightly, shallow focus, slow coherent motion
shots.sfx: hens clucking softly inside a wooden chicken coop

shots.line: Nepotul zice că-i 'brain rot'. Eu zic că-i micul dejun, mamă.
shots.image_prompt: holding a single brown egg up toward the camera with a deadpan proud expression, plump hens behind her in the coop, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she holds a single egg up toward the camera and raises an eyebrow with a deadpan smile, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Găinile mele? Productivitate maximă. Zero zile libere.
shots.image_prompt: several plump brown hens pecking at scattered grain on the dirt floor of a rustic wooden coop, warm light filtering through the wooden slats, low close-up
shots.motion_prompt: the hens peck and bob at scattered grain, one briefly flaps its wings, steady camera, natural coherent farmyard motion
shots.sfx: hens clucking and pecking at grain, occasional wing flap in a coop

shots.line: Hai să numărăm împreună! Șase... și... șapte!
shots.image_prompt: doing an exaggerated six-then-seven counting hand gesture with an excited teaching expression, the wicker basket of eggs on her hip, in the coop, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she counts on her fingers with an exaggerated teaching gesture and beams at the camera, lively but coherent motion, stable framing

shots.voiceover: Și acum, partea bună a trendului. Tigaia.
shots.image_prompt: the same brown eggs cracking and frying sunny-side-up in a cast-iron pan on a wood stove, extreme close-up, golden butter bubbling around the edges
shots.motion_prompt: the eggs sizzle and bubble in the cast-iron pan, edges crisping, gentle steam rising, slow appetizing coherent motion

sfx.prompt: eggs sizzling and crackling in a hot frying pan

shots.line: Vezi? Trendul ăsta se și mănâncă. Cu mămăligă.
shots.image_prompt: sitting at a rustic wooden table with a plate of fried eggs and polenta in front of her, holding a fork triumphantly, cozy village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she lifts a forkful from the plate and gives a satisfied nod to the camera, warm smile, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.line: Dați like dacă și voi numărați ouăle dimineața. Șase, șapte, pupici!
shots.image_prompt: waving at the camera with the plate of fried eggs in front of her, big warm smile, cozy village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she waves goodbye and blows a small kiss to the camera, warm smile, gentle coherent natural motion
